# DCS Theatre Reference

Quick reference for each DCS map — key regions, airbases, and common scenario focal points.

---

## Caucasus

**Region**: Eastern Black Sea — Georgia, Russia (Krasnodar), Armenia border  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Batumi | Bluefor | SW Georgia, main blue hub |
| Senaki | Bluefor | Central Georgia |
| Kutaisi | Bluefor | Central Georgia, longest runway |
| Tbilisi Lochini | Bluefor | Capital, large civil/mil |
| Gudauta | Redfor | Abkhazia, red forward base |
| Sukhumi | Redfor | Abkhazia capital |
| Mozdok | Redfor | Northern Russia |
| Krymsk | Redfor | South Russia |

**Common AOs**: Sukhumi corridor, Roki Tunnel, Tbilisi approaches, Poti coastal, Gori junction  
**Terrain Highlights**: Caucasus mountain range (S-N barrier), Rioni River valley, Black Sea coast

---

## Syria

**Region**: Eastern Mediterranean — Syria, Lebanon, Israel, Jordan, Turkey  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Incirlik | Bluefor | Turkey, NATO base |
| Ramat David | Bluefor | Israel |
| Hatay | Bluefor | Southern Turkey |
| Damascus | Redfor | Syrian capital |
| Khmeimim (Latakia) | Redfor | Russian/Syrian base |
| Tiyas (T4) | Redfor | Central Syria |
| Deir ez-Zor | Redfor | E Syria |

**Common AOs**: Palmyra desert, Latakia coast, Damascus approaches, Euphrates valley  
**Terrain Highlights**: Coastal mountain range, vast desert plateau, Euphrates river

---

## Persian Gulf

**Region**: Arabian Gulf — UAE, Oman, Iran, Saudi Arabia coast  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Al Dhafra | Bluefor | UAE, US/UAE base |
| Al Minhad | Bluefor | UAE |
| Dubai | Bluefor | Civilian/military |
| Bandar Abbas | Redfor | Iran, main Iranian AF |
| Qeshm Island | Redfor | Iranian naval/air |
| Shiraz | Redfor | S Iran, large base |

**Common AOs**: Strait of Hormuz, Qeshm Island, Iranian coast, Persian Gulf littoral  
**Terrain Highlights**: Flat desert, Zagros mountains (Iran), narrow strait, island chains

---

## Marianas

**Region**: Western Pacific — Guam, Saipan, Tinian, Rota (WWII / modern Pacific scenarios)  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Andersen AFB | Bluefor | Guam, USAF strategic bomber base |
| Antonio B. Won Pat (Guam) | Bluefor | International / Guard |
| Saipan | Neutral | Historic WWII site |
| Tinian | Neutral | Historic WWII site |

**Common AOs**: Open ocean strike, island beach assaults, maritime patrol  
**Terrain Highlights**: Pacific ocean, volcanic islands, coral reefs, jungle interior

---

## South Atlantic / Falklands

**Region**: South Atlantic — Falkland Islands, Argentina coast  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Mount Pleasant | Bluefor | Falklands, RAF |
| Stanley | Contested | Falkland capital strip |
| Comodoro Rivadavia | Redfor | Argentine mainland |
| Rio Grande | Redfor | Argentine TdF |

**Common AOs**: Stanley approaches, San Carlos water, Argentine coast strikes  
**Terrain Highlights**: Open ocean, moorland, high winds, limited airfields

---

## Sinai

**Region**: Middle East — Sinai Peninsula, Israel, Egypt, Red Sea  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Ben Gurion | Bluefor | Israel civilian/mil |
| Ramon | Bluefor | Negev, IASF main |
| El Arish | Neutral | North Sinai |
| Cairo International | Redfor | Egypt |
| Hurghada | Redfor | Egypt, Red Sea coast |

**Common AOs**: Sinai desert, Suez Canal, Mediterranean coast, Red Sea strikes  
**Terrain Highlights**: Sinai desert plateau, Suez Canal, narrow coastal strips

---

## Kola

**Region**: Arctic Norway — Kola Peninsula, Finland border, Barents Sea  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Bodø | Bluefor | Norway, NATO AB |
| Evenes | Bluefor | Norway |
| Banak | Bluefor | North Norway |
| Kuusamo | Bluefor | Finland |
| Olenya | Redfor | Kola, TU-22M / Su-24 base |
| Monchegorsk | Redfor | Kola, Su-27 / MiG-31 |
| Severomorsk | Redfor | Kola, naval aviation |

**Common AOs**: North Cape, Murmansk approaches, Barents Sea maritime, Finnish border  
**Terrain Highlights**: Tundra, fjords, lakes, permafrost, near-zero visibility Arctic weather

---

## Afghanistan

**Region**: Central Asia — Afghanistan, Pakistan border, Hindu Kush  
**Key Airbases**:

| Airbase | Coalition Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Bagram | Bluefor | Main US/NATO base |
| Kabul | Bluefor / Neutral | Capital, large civilian hub |
| Kandahar | Bluefor | S Afghanistan |
| Shindand | Redfor | Western Afghanistan |
| Herat | Contested | Western Afghanistan |

**Common AOs**: Kabul valley, Kunar Province, Panjshir Valley, Helmand desert  
**Terrain Highlights**: Hindu Kush mountains (extreme altitude), Kabul valley, arid desert south, river valleys
